content: Can anyone explain to me what Hilo's best team is? She seems fun with her 4cost card, but her -10% HP starts to hurt as the enemies get stronger. Is there a way to make her better?
Classic Helot's team is a Strike Build, using her Ult to power up all strike card.
yep, for the 4cost card of herself, more Power stack and more Strike cards in hand give more total damage.
in current game version, the purpose of using her 1cost card is to create a new Strike card, instead of dealing damage.
I see. Maybe I'm doing something wrong, but it sounds like she's better for PvP instead of Story Mode since it takes too long to stack damage before I get my HP lowered by the enemies.
not at all

the big thing is, at about round 3 or 4, when ur card having a red boundary effect.
it means that, if u play it out, u can not draw it agian in this battle.
that is the Dissolve mechanism of this spider boss.
And, at that round, all the damage deal by card will cause 3 times damage
OH
it's a trade off between risk and reward
now i wanna replay the fight with hilo
ult + full hand of strike cards
great, if ur Helot and Lily can give total 5k+, u can kill it at one turn
Another advice is that, level up ur charactor for a Lv.30 team.

like craux i'm also stuck at the boss of 3-13, these are my characters the only team that kind of worked was a counterattack/shield team. The problem is that the boss has a phase that if you use the cards on that round they are consumed and can't be used in that fight again (unless the translation is wrong), so i can't use any of the good shield/counterattack cards that turn, what should i do?
another problem is, the boss in 3-13 always give a 1 hit attack
it is better not to use counter-attack at that stage
a general idea is using some FAKE card to against the consumed mechanism
so i would like recommend u try purple
try Liz, Erica, Doll, Ogier
posion build
does poison work? the boss has 16k hp it's gonna take a while to build poison to kill him...
but i'll try it since i don't have a lot of choices hoenstly
u always have a final support
i clear 3-13 by using original 4 sr character, so it woun't be so hard.
oh okok
btw with purple team during the consume round the first card does still get consumed (the one that goes in the spellcaster stack)?

if u wanna play, i would like to give u more hint or clue.
me myself is a  player that enjoy the progress.
if u only want to win a certain stage, it is also OK. i would show u a possible answer
a copy of first played card would get into the stack. means u can play it one more time.
ok so it gets consumed but when the special round starts you get to play it, got it
or just end ur turn at the consumed turn, and enter the extra turn
so u can avoid the consumed mechainism

Question: Since this is my third rate up loss, does that mean the next SSR is guaranteed?

And will that carry to the next featured SSR?
Like, if I start saving now for the next new character, will they be guaranteed for me since I lost 3 rate ups on Thais banner?
Yes u said is true

1. yes, next SSR is guaranteed.
2. yes, it can be carried to next limit banner.
